title: Dressrosa Burns Under Doflamingo
description: Pages 1–5 focus on dressrosa burns under doflamingo, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Trafalgar Law as as the battle spreads, Fujitora, the Marines, and the Donquixote Family weigh their next moves in a collapsing Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, all that's left is the final!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: But wait... although we thought it would be the four officers fighting in the final matches, instead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What's this!? It's going to be the colors- Seum's hero!! Mmmister.... Diamante!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kyahhh! <3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is sudden, but his participa- tion has been confirmed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Diaman- Te-Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: to the medical room!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah, Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: I'm also in the finals...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nannesses may be the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...or not...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: 'Ey, you!! Who d'ya think y'are, talkin' to 'dis here individual all casual-like...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Rebecca, isn't it. I'm fairly aware of your back- ground.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This may get a bit messy, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's just so that everything will work out as it should...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's all just on the surface, right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It reminds me of the place where we grew up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: the king's plateau.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I've got your entry permits.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: with the lift that rises up from here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: We can reach the Royal Palace, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Lift to the entry of the Palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: If we're dis- covered, the lift will be stopped and then it's all over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: So we're not going with that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But more importantly, you look far too suspi- cious.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: You Wound me, that you do.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Hey, you're the one who was leading around our cook, before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Black leg??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Uohhh my beloved vio- let-chean! <3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: He went to go save your ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Yeah we know that much.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Didn't you say something about working for Mingo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: She was...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: She was only pretending to be Doflamingo's subordinate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Wicca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Ohh....!! You remember me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Did you forget about my power?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I've been watching what you guys have been up to all along!

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: And the one-legged soldier-san...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: who, in place of my deceased older sister, had been raising Rebecca...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I've also seen how he started to fight along- side you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: The first thing I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: I've seen it all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Thank you for Believ- ing in my father.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Wahhhh... Viola-sa- Maaa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Ehh?? You're a princess??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Well, a long time ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Hmm? So if Rebecca is the King's Grand- Daughter, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: You're her mother!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: head on in.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Ohh a hidden gate! Are you a Ninja?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Rebecca's my niece. My sister's daughter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: wow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: This has been passed down through Gen- Erations of the Riku line.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: It's an emergency passage- way...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: Even Dofla- Mingo doesn't know about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: There's also a basket for lifting up supplies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Whoa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: You can reach the Palace via these stairs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: Cough cough

summary: Dressrosa Burns Under Doflamingo focuses on Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as as the battle spreads, Fujitora, the Marines, and the Donquixote Family weigh their next moves in a collapsing Dressrosa.
